summary: Comprehensive testing of Content Vault features completed. All requested features verified working: Kids Story Themes, Moral Templates, Reel Structures with best_for field, and PDF download functionality.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Content Vault features fully tested and working. API returns kids_themes, moral_templates, reel_structures (with best_for field), and viral_hooks. PDF download shows upgrade modal for free tier with 'Download with Watermark' option. Story generation works with template-based approach.

details.kids_themes: Returns 5 themes for free tier (15 total) with theme, age_group, moral fields
details.moral_templates: Returns 5 templates for free tier (18 total) with theme, moral fields
details.reel_structures: Returns 5 structures for free tier (8 total) with name, structure, best_for fields
details.viral_hooks: Returns 12 hooks with hook, niche fields
details.niche_filter: Works correctly - filters hooks by niche

details.stats_bar: Shows all 4 categories with correct counts (12/12 hooks, 5/8 structures, 5/15 themes, 5/18 morals)
details.kids_themes_section: Displays themes with theme name, age group badge, and moral text
details.moral_templates_section: Displays templates with theme badge, moral quote, and copy button
details.reel_structures_section: Displays structures with name, steps, and 'Best for:' field
details.viral_hooks_section: Displays hooks with niche badge and copy button

details.pdf_button: Shows 'Remove Watermark?' modal for free tier
details.download_with_watermark: Option available for free tier users
details.printable_book: Available for 4 credits with personalization option (+2 credits)

details.form_fields: Age Group, Genre, Number of Scenes
details.output: Shows title, synopsis, characters, scenes, YouTube metadata

test_execution_summary.api_tests: All Content Vault API tests passed
